name: io.github.toolwright-adk/linear-bootstrap
description: Bootstrap Linear projects from natural language — milestones, epics, issues, and dependencies.

environmentVariables.name: LLM_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key for an OpenAI-compatible LLM provider

environmentVariables.name: LLM_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL for the LLM API (e.g. https://openrouter.ai/api/v1)

environmentVariables.name: LLM_MODEL
environmentVariables.description: Model ID for plan generation (e.g. anthropic/claude-sonnet-4.6)
